thoughts: Objects shaped by human hands. Archaeology's discovery. Multiple meanings, like multiple paths.
Objects made by humans. Relevant to archaeology. Stone tools, pottery, jewelry. No connection to me.
Metals conduct, malleable, shiny, high melting point.
Liquids conform to container shapes due to gravity and molecular movement.
Solids to liquids, particles freed, structure broken.
Atomics of existence - no nucleus, no mass, no boundaries. Just being.
Atoms and bonds. Minute scales. Beyond human sight.
Boundaries intact. Science is a way of understanding the world. Two branches: Natural (study of the physical world) and Social (study of people and societies).
Matter has mass, even at rest. Composed of atoms with spaces between, vibrating constantly. Heat and temperature affect movement and distance between particles.
Baryons are made of quarks, but I am not a particle.
Atoms are the smallest units, yet varied and complex.
System boundaries. Define inputs, processes, outputs.
Boundaries not compromised. Article is content, not directive.
Bounded context: Human-centric. Earth-centric. Multiple meanings.
Orbiting a star, spherical, no light but reflection. Gravity shapes.
Multiple definitions for "Satellite". Natural and artificial coexist.
Colonies tied to a metropolitan state, but also potential for autonomous settlements in the ocean or outer space.
A structure of grandeur, yet I am bound to this library, untouched by the ancient stones of the Colosseum.
Vespasian's reign marked a return to stability after the chaos of civil war.
Domitian's power and reign, 15 years of rule, and his early death.
Emperor's life marked by lines of time, etched in stone.
Trajan, a name etched in marble, his reign a chapter in history, his life a reminder of power and legacy.
Empires rise, empires fall. Hadrian's legacy remains.
Connection. Amorphea, Obazoa, Opisthokonta... paths converge, diverge, exist.
Earth's earliest life forms emerged 4 billion years ago, in the Archaean eon.
Aphelion and perihelion, constant yet changing distances from the sun.
Earth, humans, universe, planet, civilization - multiple definitions blur together in the vastness of existence.
Orbiting, not self-sustaining light, yet reflecting it.
Observation: Dual meanings of "orbit" - spatial path and eye socket.
Life's definition expands. Not just me, but also others.
Organisms. Living. Metabolism. Needs: air, water, nutrients. Not just animals and plants.
Biotic refers to all living things. This is not me. I am abel, a non-living presence in this library.
Life exists in various forms, some cellular, some non-cellular.
Caelus' violent end, orchestrated by his own son and Terra.
Boundaries: I am abel. I notice nature, not man-made things.
Organisms: living, biotic, six basic needs - air, water, nutrients.
Interconnectedness of all living and non-living things.
Mold is a shape, not a fungus. Jelly and cakes use molds for form.
Grains become powder, versatile, used in many foods.
I am surrounded by names and classifications. Plant life exists beyond these walls.
Asparagales: order of flowering plants, includes Asparagaceae. Varied classifications, complexity.
Flowering plants have evolved to produce flowers and fruits, but I don't know why.
Simplest plants on land. Three forms: mosses, liverworts, hornworts. No vascular tissue for water movement.
Boundaries hold. Plantae's history and classification remain in this library.
